fiveLayerFilter.layer0_5: topic_based不执行关键词扫描(设计讨论无跨任务概念)
fiveLayerFilter.layer1: ANALYZING强制选择+logprobs+第二分类维度S/T/U
fiveLayerFilter.layer2: IN_SESSION topic_based:三层注入(领域规则+关联摘要+topicEvolution分层包)+v5.4 tool calling+v5.5工具分层

mechanisms.v5.7: 对话分段保留(产出物确认节点分段+摘要分级)
mechanisms.S3: switch口令触发KV Cache释放+roomStateIndex注入
